items.title: Head of Operations
items.description: Coordination and management of several pooled humanitarian logistics projects
bullets: Steering two parallel projects: emergency preparedness (South) and emergency response to Cyclone Gezani (East Coast)
Direct management of a multidisciplinary team spread across three offices, including project managers and a field coordinator (20+ staff)
Strategic and operational planning, budget oversight, performance analysis and donor reporting (budget: €750k)
Consortium coordination, institutional partnerships and representation in inter-NGO mechanisms
Development of new projects and drafting of funding proposals, building and recruiting a full team

items.title: Visiting lecturer
bullets: "Human Rights" course: module on LGBTQIA+ rights, history and international issues
"Humanitarian Action" course: session on logistics and humanitarian field action

items.title: Country Logistics Manager
items.description:
Response to the full-scale invasion of 2022 
 Protection, inclusion, rehabilitation and armed violence reduction activities
bullets: Management of the logistics team in the capital and across three sites (62 staff, 8 direct reports)
Training and support for position nationalisation
Logistics support for local partners
Supervision of HR processes (recruitment, appraisals, training)
Supervision and logistics support to projects
Definition of logistics strategies and activity planning
Supervision of national supply flows and customs clearance operations

items.title: Head of Logistics Department
items.description: Multisectoral response supporting populations and public services affected by the conflict stemming from the 2022 invasion
bullets: Management of the logistics team in the capital and support to four (then two) provincial bases
Team management and leadership (around 15 staff)
Training and support for position nationalisation
Logistics support for local partners
Supervision of HR processes (recruitment, appraisals, training)
Supervision and logistics support to projects
Definition of logistics strategies and activity planning
Supervision of national supply flows and customs clearance operations

items.title: National Logistics Coordinator
items.description: Emergency responses to the health needs of populations affected by the conflict in the Central African Republic
bullets: Management of the logistics team in the capital and support to two provincial bases
Team management (around 25 staff), HR supervision (recruitment, appraisals, training) and drafting of job descriptions
Supervision and logistics support to projects
Definition of logistics strategies and activity planning
Technical support to a mobile clinic project in an emergency response context
Supervision of the operational implementation of security procedures and participation in crisis cells
Supervision of national supply flows and customs clearance operations
Supervision of health centre rehabilitation and construction works
Representation and networking (RLH, ClusterLog, NGOs)

items.title: Regional Logistics Manager
items.description: Emergency responses to the health needs of populations affected by the conflict in eastern DR Congo
bullets: Management and leadership of a team (around a dozen staff)
Supervision of supply, transport and storage of programme inputs across the province
Monitoring and management of the vehicle, telecoms and IT fleets
Opening of a sub-base as part of an emergency response, participation in designing and launching a rapid response
Participation in project design, budget drafting and monitoring
Security watch and monitoring (base, travel), drafting of protocols and audits
Steering HR processes (recruitment, appraisals, needs assessment)
Supervision of the rehabilitation and construction of health centres
Training of teams (Excel, Word, stock management, purchasing procedures, etc.)

items.title: Project Logistician
items.description: Emergency responses in the context of Covid-19, in squats and slums
bullets: Stock management and monitoring
Management of Covid-19 PPE (stocks, orders, preparation, monitoring)
Supply monitoring
Preparation of distributions and interventions
Upgrade of the IT fleet
Creation and update of protocols (outings, stocks, purchases)
Support for security assessment

items.title: Legal Support Officer for Studies and Diagnostics
items.description: Support to the regional management on an exploratory mission on the situation of migrant people in southern Tunisia (Medenine and Tataouine governorates), and analysis of the legal framework for two initial diagnoses on Tunisian territory
bullets: Study on sexual violence and the sexual and reproductive health needs of young people and women with disabilities
Study on the conditions of residence, reception and access to mainstream services for migrant people

items.title: Programme Coordination Support Officer
bullets: Participation in actions supporting partners' capacity building
Project monitoring support (logical frameworks, budgets, job descriptions, reports)
Redesign of a data collection tool (needs definition, specifications, interface, ethics, security, features)
Design of a communication plan and a new graphic identity, support for the "digitisation" of selected processes
Writing and layout of awareness-raising materials and news briefs
Facilitation of meetings and team-building

items.title: Legal Support Officer at the civic life centre
items.description: Support to the implementation of procedures redesigning public reception. Legal studies on the feasibility of partnership projects and long leases

items.title: Chocolate shop assistant
items.description: Welcoming and advising customers, selling and cashing, stocking shelves and product rotation, receiving and preparing orders, monitoring stock levels, production.

items.title: Deputy Transport Service Manager
items.description: Drafting of driver schedules, coordination and supervision of a team (~15 staff), matching customer demand to resource use, training initiatives for staff, organisation and optimisation of operational resources, productivity control and optimisation, deputising for the service manager

items.title: Transport Operations Officer
items.description: Registering and entering departure flows, handling complaints, monitoring and optimising processes, dispatching rounds, cross-departmental coordination

items.title: Warehouse handler
items.description: Receiving and accounting for goods, quality control and sorting of products, repackaging of goods.
